_comment: Editable taxonomy. The LLM must classify each new repo into exactly one 'name' below (falling back to 'Other'). 'description' anchors the model's choice. After editing, run: python scripts/stars.py --force

categories.name: AI & LLM Tools
categories.description: LLM apps, agents, MCP servers, prompt tooling, AI assistants, model inference, and AI-powered products.

categories.name: CLI & Terminal
categories.description: Command-line tools, shells, TUIs, terminal utilities, prompt frameworks, and CLI productivity.

categories.name: System Monitoring
categories.description: System/hardware monitors, resource dashboards, menu-bar stats, benchmarking, and observability of a local machine.

categories.name: Self-Hosted Apps
categories.description: Self-hostable services and web apps you run yourself: dashboards, note/bookmark tools, media, docs/wikis, subscription trackers, notifications.

categories.name: Developer Tools
categories.description: General dev tooling not specific to one platform: code review, CI helpers, git tooling, linters, editors, debuggers, task runners, scripting utilities.

categories.name: Web & Frontend
categories.description: Frontend frameworks, UI component libraries, web design/dev tooling, and browser-based app building blocks.

categories.name: Mobile & Desktop Apps
categories.description: Native or cross-platform app development and apps for iOS/Android/macOS/Windows/Linux: SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter/Dart, desktop clients.

categories.name: Game Dev & Unity
categories.description: Game development, engines, Unity/C# libraries and editor extensions, VR/social frameworks, and interactive/real-time media tooling.

categories.name: Libraries & SDKs
categories.description: Reusable programming libraries, SDKs, serialization, networking, and language-level frameworks that are embedded into other software.

categories.name: Security & Secrets
categories.description: Authentication/SSO, secrets/credential management, env-var handling, encryption, and security/privacy tooling.

categories.name: Blogs, Themes & Static Sites
categories.description: Static-site generators, blog themes/templates, CMS for static blogs, and personal-website scaffolding.

categories.name: File Sharing & Transfer
categories.description: File upload/sharing/transfer tools, cross-device send, screen recording/sharing, and self-hosted file servers.

categories.name: Learning & Reference
categories.description: Cheat sheets, tutorials, guides, curated lists, datasets, and educational or reference material.

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Anything that does not clearly fit another category.
